_doc: Drop-week runbook step 4 artifact (docs/SYNAPSE_H22_GAP_BLUEPRINT.md §9.4): connectivity sweep re-run against live H22.0.368, diffed against the frozen H21.0.671 left side. The H22 CATALOG itself is harness/notes/verified_connectivity_22.0.368.json (written by the reused probe, native build-stamped name, schema verified_connectivity/v2); THIS file is the diff + adjudication record. Nothing here updates the packaged catalog (python/synapse/cognitive/tools/data/connectivity_21.json) or any python/synapse source — that is the U.1-H22 cycle's SCAFFOLD phase, gated behind human ratification (runbook step 10).
gate: GATE VERDICT: ALLOW (h22-gatewarden, MODE B, this session) carried in dispatch

baseline_hash_check._what: leg0_baselines.json consumers[] contract: hash-check the left side BEFORE trusting any diff.

probe_provenance.determinism: byte-identical across consecutive runs on 22.0.368 (U.1 determinism pin holds on H22)
probe_provenance.stdout_summary: CONNECTIVITY: build=22.0.368 types=288 instantiated=269 with_input_labels=228 probe_errors=0 blake2b=e43720dbfa83
probe_provenance.v1_preserved_note: H22 catalog carries v1_preserved=null — correct by design: the fold only carries a prior file matching the CURRENT build's name, and H21's dir()-membership facts do not transfer across a major.

removed.note: recipe namespace reorganized — replaced by Data/sidefx::recipe::cop/convolve3::blur (see added)
SYNAPSE-EMITTED spelling no longer resolves in H22 Solaris (version-stripped matching included — no instancer::N.0 either). createNode('instancer') in a LOP net will fail on H22.
SYNAPSE-EMITTED spelling no longer resolves in H22 Solaris. createNode('layout') in a LOP net will fail on H22.

Cop/light.note: MISWIRE CLASS: 'N' renamed to 'normal'; 'mask' moved index 2 → 7. Any setInput wiring Cop light by remembered H21 index is silently wrong on H22 — exactly the drift U.1 exists to catch.

expected_churn_adjudication._what: The four churn classes the blueprint told step 4 to look for, adjudicated against this sweep's actual scope (emitted surface + Sop solver|merge|switch|blend pattern).
expected_churn_adjudication.copernicus_heightfield_set: CONFIRMED IN-SCOPE. heightfield_erode, oceanspectrum, oceanevaluate, camera now ALSO resolve in the Cop category (SOPs→COPs migration visible on the emitted surface). Cop/file + Cop/light wiring surfaces changed (see diff.changed).
expected_churn_adjudication.solaris_procedurals: CONFIRMED IN-SCOPE (as removals): Lop/instancer + Lop/layout — both SYNAPSE-emitted — are gone from H22. Replacement spelling unknown from this probe; needs a nodetype-catalog follow-up before any planner emit path touches them on H22.
expected_churn_adjudication.ml_onnx: OUT OF THIS SWEEP'S SCOPE — no ML/ONNX type is in SYNAPSE's emitted surface and none matches the Sop solver|merge|switch|blend pattern, so this catalog is structurally blind to them. Belongs to runbook step 9 (new-symbol probes) / the nodetype catalog regen.
expected_churn_adjudication.splat_nodes: OUT OF THIS SWEEP'S SCOPE — same reason as ml_onnx. Belongs to runbook step 9 / nodetype catalog regen.

golden_seeds._what: The two known-true U.1 regression seeds, re-verified on H22.

rigging_scope_note: Sop/apex::* rows above are PROBE TRUTH RECORDS ONLY (the probe found them because emitted_node_types.json carries apex::controlextract and 'scenemerge' matches the Sop pattern). Rigging/KineFX/APEX build work remains structurally REFUSED per blueprint §6.1 — no follow-up cycle may scaffold against these entries.
follow_up_feeds: harness/state/flywheel_queue.json cycle U.1-H22 (status candidate, ratified false — ratification is human, runbook step 10)
